_comment: Datadog Watchdog Insight for the INC-DEMO-001 scenario. The deploy at 08:10 introduced the off-by-one; error_rate starts climbing at 08:30 and Watchdog flags the window 08:30-08:50 as HIGH severity on inventory-service.error_rate. This shape matches what the Datadog MCP's watchdog_list_insights tool returns (fields renamed to our internal contract).
